testcase.name: testSubmitTransaction_Duplicate

failure.message: Unexpected exception type thrown ==> expected: <com.example.transactionservice.exception.DuplicateTransactionException> but was: <java.lang.NullPointerException>

testcase.name: testSubmitTransaction_IdempotencyViolation

failure.message: Unexpected exception type thrown ==> expected: <com.example.transactionservice.exception.IdempotencyViolationException> but was: <java.lang.NullPointerException>

testcase.failure: org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Unexpected exception type thrown ==> expected: <com.example.transactionservice.exception.IdempotencyViolationException> but was:
